The vernacular songs of lunatics, utterances of children and

the words of women do not at all go wrong in their effects.
[The words of playing children etc. are of great importance in

This Supreme Goddess of Speech is always truthful. She does
not speak unless she is goaded. For, first She travels among the
Gods and then (being goaded by them) goes to the mortals.
[Here we are reminded of the Brahmana statement,
t ^T:'. Being wedded to truth the Gods cause portentous words and
behaviour to be revealed through all kinds of beings, young and old,
human and sub-human. Hence what the author has said in verse 2
of this chapter stands confirmed by this statement. These 15 verses,
are taken from the work of Rsiputra.]
